description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and neck, giving it a surreal and abstract appearance. The figure is dressed in what appears to be a fitted jacket and pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The arms are unnaturally stretched upwards, merging into two long, angular extensions that dominate the upper part of the object. The head is small and positioned at the end of an extended neck, with minimal facial detail. The legs are bent at the knees, and the feet are pointed downward, suggesting a dynamic or suspended pose. The overall form is highly stylized, with smooth surfaces and simplified anatomical features.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure with stretched limbs and neck, dressed in fitted clothing and posed dynamically. The form is abstract, with smooth surfaces and minimal facial detail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elongated arms raised and merging into angular extensions, with the head and face visible at the end of a long neck.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme length of the neck and arms, with the bent legs and downward-pointed feet visible.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view reveals the back of the figure, the angular arm extensions, and the curvature of the body and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the stretched limbs and the dynamic, suspended posture of the figure.
attribute_posture: arms raised, body bent, dynamic suspended pose
